2.description: get parcels in Stavanger filtered by agricultural land use

final.sql:
-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teig.teig_id AS teigid, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(teig.geom, 4326)) AS geom_geojson FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_e8677417d90b4b10956a8d8a7c25295b.teig teig JOIN matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_e8677417d90b4b10956a8d8a7c25295b.ar5_teigbruk ar5 ON teig.teig_id = ar5.teig_id WHERE teig.kommunenummer = '1103' AND ar5.ar5_bruksnummer IN (11, 12, 20, 30);
